title: TrackTx pipeline parameters
description: Nextflow pipeline for PRO-seq / GRO-seq nascent RNA analysis.

core_options.title: Core options
core_options.description: Required paths and fundamental run settings.

samplesheet.description: Path to the samplesheet CSV file.
samplesheet.help_text: Columns: sample, condition (or treatment), timepoint, replicate, file1[, file2]. Paths in file1/file2 may be absolute or relative to the project directory.

output_dir.description: Directory where all results are written.

experiment_name.description: Human-readable label for this experiment (used in reports).

control_label.description: Value in the condition column that identifies control samples.
control_label.help_text: Used to orient differential / contrast analyses in the Pol-II metrics step.

sample_source.description: Whether reads come from local files or are downloaded from SRA.
sample_source.help_text: 'local' — file1/file2 in the samplesheet are paths to FASTQ files on disk. 'srr' — file1 is an SRR accession; the pipeline downloads FASTQs automatically.

library_type.description: Library preparation protocol. Controls read strand orientation during alignment.
library_type.help_text: 'proseq' (default) — PRO-seq / TT-seq: reads are reverse-complemented before alignment because the sequenced strand is the template strand opposite to the nascent RNA. 'groseq' — GRO-seq / GRO-cap / csRNA-seq: reads are aligned as-is because they directly represent the nascent RNA strand. Using the wrong mode maps every read to the wrong strand.

sra_download_options.title: SRA download options
sra_download_options.description: Settings for downloading FASTQ files from NCBI SRA. Only used when sample_source is 'srr'.

sra_download_source.help_text: 'auto' tries NCBI first and falls back to ENA on failure. 'ncbi' forces NCBI only. 'ena' forces ENA (European Nucleotide Archive) only.

sra_tmp.description: Temporary directory for fasterq-dump intermediate files.
sra_tmp.help_text: Set this to a fast local disk path when the Nextflow work directory is on slow network storage. null = use the Nextflow work directory.

sra_max_size.description: Maximum file size for prefetch (passed as --max-size).

fastq_gzip.description: Compress downloaded FASTQs with pigz after conversion.
fastq_gzip.help_text: Reduces disk usage for the raw FASTQ cache at the cost of ~10–20% extra runtime during the download step.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Primary and spike-in genome assembly settings.

reference_genome.help_text: Built-in assemblies: hg38, hs1, mm10, mm39, dm6, ce11, danRer11, rn7, sacCer3. Set to 'other' and supply genome_fasta to use a custom FASTA.

genome_fasta.description: Path to a custom genome FASTA. Required when reference_genome is 'other'.

spikein_genome.description: Spike-in genome assembly identifier (same built-in list as reference_genome).
spikein_genome.help_text: Enables spike-in normalisation (siCPM). Set to 'other' and supply spikein_fasta for a custom spike-in. Omit or set to null to disable spike-in normalisation.

spikein_fasta.description: Path to a custom spike-in FASTA. Required when spikein_genome is 'other'.

genome_cache.description: Directory where downloaded genome FASTAs and Bowtie2 indices are cached.

force_rebuild.description: Re-download and re-build the genome index even if it is already cached.

annotation_options.title: Gene annotation options
annotation_options.description: Settings for downloading or providing gene annotations (GTF).

annotation_source.description: Annotation source used when downloading a GTF automatically.
annotation_source.help_text: 'refseq' — UCSC RefSeq (recommended; chr-prefixed). 'ensembl' — Ensembl (no chr prefix by default). 'gencode' — GENCODE (human and mouse only).

gtf_path.description: Path to a local GTF file. Overrides annotation_source.

gtf_url.description: URL of a GTF file to download. Overrides annotation_source.

annotation_exclude_biotypes.description: Comma-separated biotypes to exclude from annotations (e.g. 'rRNA,tRNA,snRNA').
annotation_exclude_biotypes.help_text: Genes with these biotypes are removed before TSS/TES BED generation and are not used in any downstream step.

annotation_chr_naming.description: Chromosome naming conversion applied to the downloaded GTF.
annotation_chr_naming.help_text: 'none' — no conversion (use as-is). 'add' — prepend 'chr' (Ensembl → UCSC). 'remove' — strip 'chr' (UCSC → Ensembl).

read_preprocessing_options.title: Read preprocessing options
read_preprocessing_options.description: Adapter trimming, barcode removal, UMI extraction, and raw-read QC settings.

fastqc_raw.description: Run FastQC on raw (pre-trimming) reads in addition to trimmed reads.
fastqc_raw.help_text: Set to false to skip FastQC on raw reads and save time when library quality is already known.

adapter1.description: Adapter sequence for R1 (e.g. 'TGGAATTCTCGGGTGCCAAGG' for TruSeq small RNA).

adapter2.description: Adapter sequence for R2. Only used in paired-end mode.

minlen.description: Hard minimum read length (bp) passed to cutadapt -m. 0 = auto-calculate from barcode + UMI lengths.

enabled.description: Remove a fixed-length inline barcode from R1.

location.description: End of the read the barcode is on: 5 (5' end) or 3 (3' end).

r2_enabled.description: Remove a fixed-length barcode from R2. Paired-end only.

r2_length.description: R2 barcode length in bp. Paired-end only.

r2_location.description: End of R2 the barcode is on: 5 or 3. Paired-end only.

enabled.description: Extract UMIs with umi_tools and append them to read names.

location.description: End of the read the UMI is on: 5 (5' end) or 3 (3' end).

quality_control_options.title: Quality control options
quality_control_options.description: Post-alignment QC metrics, MAPQ filtering, and failure thresholds.

mapq.description: Minimum MAPQ score for a read to be counted as mapped (samtools view -q).

dedup.description: Deduplicate reads using UMI information before QC metrics. Requires umi.enabled.

depth_max_cov.description: Maximum coverage depth for samtools depth. 0 = unlimited.

fail_map_rate_below.description: Fail the pipeline if the overall mapping rate (%) falls below this value. Omit to disable.
fail_map_rate_below.help_text: Example: set to 50 to fail the pipeline if fewer than 50% of reads map. null or omitting disables the check.

fail_strand_min.description: Fail the pipeline if either strand's read fraction falls below this value (0–1). Omit to disable.
fail_strand_min.help_text: Example: 0.30 fails the pipeline if either strand carries less than 30% of reads — useful for detecting strand-swap or library prep failures.

output_format_options.title: Output format options
output_format_options.description: Which track formats and normalisation methods to publish.

output.description: Track format and normalisation output flags.

crpmsi.description: Publish siCPM-normalised tracks (spike-in CPM). Requires spikein_genome.

bigwig.description: Publish BigWig files. Required by most genome browsers.

bedgraph.description: Publish bedGraph files alongside BigWigs. ~100 MB extra per sample.

emit_bw.description: Publish BigWig files for normalised tracks (CPM, siCPM).

emit_sicpm.description: Compute and publish siCPM normalised tracks. Requires spikein_genome.

emit_5p.description: Compute 5'-end tracks. null = auto-detect based on library type.
emit_5p.help_text: true = always generate 5' tracks. false = never generate 5' tracks. null (default) = auto-detect.

gene_end_method.description: Gene-end normalisation method for transcript body scaling.
gene_end_method.help_text: 'none' — disabled. 'tes_window' — scale by signal in a window upstream of TES. 'gene_body' — scale by total gene body signal.

gene_end_window.description: Width (bp) of the TES window when gene_end_method is 'tes_window'.

gene_end_min_reads.description: Minimum read count required to include a gene in gene_body scaling.

timeout_bw.description: Timeout (seconds) for bedGraphToBigWig conversion per track. Omit for no timeout.
timeout_bw.help_text: Increase on slow network storage if BigWig conversion times out.

divergent_transcription_options.title: Divergent transcription detection
divergent_transcription_options.description: Algorithm parameters for the GMM-based divergent transcription peak caller.

divergent_threshold.description: Per-bin signal threshold for peak calling. 'auto' = calibrated from data.
divergent_threshold.help_text: Set to a numeric string (e.g. '0.05') to override auto-calibration. 'auto' uses divergent_calibration_percentile to derive the threshold from the data.

divergent_sum_thr.description: Minimum total signal a peak must have. 'auto' = threshold × divergent_calibration_sum_multiplier.

divergent_fdr.description: False discovery rate cutoff for the GMM-based peak classifier.

divergent_calibration_percentile.description: Percentile of per-bin signal used to set the auto threshold. Higher = stricter.

divergent_calibration_sum_multiplier.description: Auto sum_thr = auto threshold × this multiplier.

divergent_calibration_background_lower.description: Calibrate using only the lower 50% of bins (background estimate).

divergent_merge_gap.description: Merge adjacent divergent peaks separated by fewer than N bp.

divergent_nt_window.description: Maximum edge-to-edge gap (bp) allowed when pairing plus/minus peaks.

divergent_balance.description: Minimum signal balance ratio (plus / total) for a valid peak pair. 0.0 = no requirement.

divergent_bin_gap.description: Maximum within-peak gap (bp). Bins further apart are split into separate peaks.

prep_insert_minlen.description: Minimum insert length (bp) after all trimming. Reads shorter than this are discarded.

cutadapt_extra.description: Extra arguments appended verbatim to the cutadapt command.

bowtie2_extra.description: Extra arguments appended verbatim to the bowtie2 command.

functional_region_options.title: Functional region options
functional_region_options.description: Geometry and signal thresholds for promoter, gene body, enhancer, and termination region assignment.

functional_regions.description: Functional region geometry and signal settings.

prom_up.description: Promoter window: bp upstream of TSS included in the promoter region.

prom_down.description: Promoter window: bp downstream of TSS included in the promoter region.

div_inner.description: Inner boundary of the divergent transcription window (bp from TSS).

div_outer.description: Outer boundary of the divergent transcription window (bp from TSS).

tw_length.description: Length of the termination window downstream of TES (bp).

min_signal.description: Minimum signal for a region to be reported. 0.0 = report all regions.

count_mode.description: How to measure signal within a region.
count_mode.help_text: 'signal' — sum of coverage (bedtools map -o sum). 'event' — count of read 3' ends.

tss_active_pm.description: TSS active window: a gene is 'active' if a divergent peak falls within ±N bp of its TSS.

allow_unstranded.description: Allow genes without strand annotation to be included.

div_fallback_enable.description: Enable a fallback strategy for active-gene calling when no divergent peak is near the TSS.

div_fallback_max_frac.description: Signal fraction of the gene body above which the fallback is triggered.

div_fallback_threshold.description: Signal threshold used by the fallback algorithm.

active_slop.description: Extend the active region by N bp on each side.

min_signal_quantile.description: Percentile of per-gene signals used as a minimum-signal quantile filter.

polymerase_metrics_options.title: Polymerase occupancy metrics
polymerase_metrics_options.description: Settings for Pol-II density, pausing index, and cohort-level summaries.

contrasts.description: Pairwise contrasts for differential Pol-II analysis.
contrasts.help_text: Each entry is a list: [condition_A, condition_B] or [condition_A, timepoint_A, condition_B, timepoint_B]. Example: [["control", "treated"]].

top_n.description: Number of top genes (by pausing index) to highlight in summary plots.

plots.description: Generate summary plots in the cohort report.

dedup.description: Deduplicate reads for Pol-II density calculation (uses UMI when available).

replicate_options.title: Replicate merging
replicate_options.description: Optional concordance-checked merging of biological replicates after alignment.

merge.help_text: Before merging, pairwise concordance between all replicates is checked. Replicates below concordance_min are kept separate and a warning is emitted.

concordance_min.description: Minimum pairwise correlation required to allow merging.

concordance_method.description: Correlation method used for concordance check.

storage_options.title: Storage and publishing options
storage_options.description: Controls which intermediate and final files are published to the results directory.

publish_mode.help_text: 'link' — hard links (default; fast, no extra disk use). 'copy' — full copy (required for exFAT/USB/NAS drives where hard links fail). 'symlink' or 'move' are also valid Nextflow modes.

publish_sra_fastq.description: Save raw downloaded SRA FASTQs to results/00_sra_cache/.
publish_sra_fastq.help_text: false — raw FASTQs are cached in results/.sra_cache/ (hidden from results view), saving ~100 GB+ per dataset. The trimmed-FASTQ re-run check provides re-run safety regardless of this setting. Only applies when sample_source is 'srr'.

publish_trimmed_fastq.description: Publish trimmed FASTQs to results/01_trimmed_fastq/. (~900 MB per sample)
publish_trimmed_fastq.help_text: false — trimmed FASTQs stay in work/ until nextflow clean -f. WARNING: also disables the SRR re-run shortcut — the pipeline checks for trimmed FASTQs on re-run, so if they are not published they won't be found and downloads will repeat.

publish_alignments.description: Publish BAM files to results/02_alignments/. (~270 MB per sample)
publish_alignments.help_text: false — BAMs stay in work/ until nextflow clean -f. All downstream steps still run.

publish_references_gtf.description: Publish the full reference GTF to results/00_references/. (~790 MB, one-time)
publish_references_gtf.help_text: Derived files (genes.tsv, tss.bed, tes.bed) are always published regardless of this setting.

reporting_options.title: Reporting and logging
reporting_options.description: HTML report content and terminal verbosity settings.

reports_plots.description: Number of per-gene coverage plots to embed in HTML reports. 0 = no plots.
reports_plots.help_text: Higher values increase report size significantly. Recommended range: 0–50.

verbose.description: Enable step-by-step progress logging to the terminal.

debug.description: Enable debug-level logging (very detailed; useful for troubleshooting).

debug_report.description: Emit extra debug information inside HTML reports.

system_options.title: System and performance options
system_options.description: Performance tuning, caching behaviour, and miscellaneous system settings.

assets_dir.description: Directory for pipeline sentinel/placeholder files. Rarely needs changing.

preprocess_reads_lenient_cache.description: Use lenient cache checking for the preprocess_reads step.
preprocess_reads_lenient_cache.help_text: Hashes by file name + size instead of content. Enable on NFS/network storage where inode-based hashing causes spurious cache misses.

force_sort_bedgraph.description: Force bedGraph files to be sorted before BigWig conversion.
force_sort_bedgraph.help_text: Enable if you encounter 'bedGraph is not sorted' errors from bedGraphToBigWig.

counts_allow_index_build.description: Allow featureCounts to build its own index if a pre-built one is missing.

conda_options.title: Conda environment overrides
conda_options.description: Override the conda environment used by specific modules. null = use the pipeline default (envs/tracktx.yaml).

conda_sra.description: Conda environment override for the download_sra_samples module.

conda_norm.description: Conda environment override for the normalize_coverage_tracks module.

conda_pol.description: Conda environment override for calculate_polymerase_occupancy_metrics and summarize_polymerase_metrics.

conda_divergent.description: Conda environment override for the detect_divergent_transcription module.

conda_fgr.description: Conda environment override for the assign_signal_to_functional_regions module.
